scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/backend && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && cp -n packages/backend/.env.example packages/backend/.env; npm run prisma:migrate --workspace=packages/backend
